name: Rich Delicious Orange Tea Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare pans.
Combine first four ingredients and blend well. Melt butter, turn off heat, and stir in orange juice, rind, and eggs. Beat. Stir dry mix into wet mix and blend until just moistened. Spoon batter into pans. Soak one sugar cube in orange juice for each muffin and place on top of the batter. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until done. Makes 8-9 large muffins.
